summary: QR code and nearby offers feature testing - All backend tests passed (13/13). All frontend tests passed. New features: QR scan button (blue) on main screen, QR page with scan/show modes, nearby offers API with distance calculation, coupon activation system, activations tracking, redemption flow. Category grid confirmed 3 columns. All previous features working.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_qr_nearby_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for QR and nearby offers features
seed_data_creation: Test coupon activations created during testing. Multiple activations with user_name='TEST User' and 'TEST Redeem User'. One activation marked as redeemed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR code system fully functional. Backend: nearby offers API calculates distance using Haversine formula, QR data endpoint returns location info with active offers, coupon activation creates activation records, activations list requires business/admin auth, redeem endpoint marks coupons as used. Frontend: QR scan button (blue #3B82F6) on main map controls, QR page at /qr with scan/show toggle, camera permission prompt in scan mode, show mode displays QR code placeholder. Category grid confirmed 3 columns. All previous features (map, offers, events, categories, detail pages) working correctly.

nearby_offers.test_nearby_offers_with_coords: ✓ GET /api/offers/nearby?lat=44.88&lng=18.43&radius=1000 returns nearby offers with distance field, sorted by distance ascending
nearby_offers.test_nearby_offers_different_radius: ✓ Radius filtering works - 500m returns subset of 2000m results
nearby_offers.test_nearby_offers_missing_params: ✓ Endpoint validates required params (lat, lng) - returns 422 if missing

qr_data.test_get_qr_data_for_location: ✓ GET /api/locations/{id}/qr-data returns location_id, location_name, offers array

coupon_activation.test_activate_coupon_success: ✓ POST /api/offers/{id}/activate creates activation, returns activation_id, offer_title, message

activations_list.test_get_activations_without_auth: ✓ GET /api/offers/{id}/activations requires auth - returns 401 without token
activations_list.test_get_activations_with_admin_auth: ✓ Returns activations array with admin auth (id, offer_id, location_id, user_name, activated_at, redeemed)

redeem_coupon.test_redeem_coupon_without_auth: ✓ PUT /api/coupon-activations/{id}/redeem requires auth - returns 401 without token
redeem_coupon.test_redeem_coupon_with_admin_auth: ✓ Marks activation as redeemed, sets redeemed_at timestamp, verified in database

qr_button.visibility: ✓ QR scan button visible on main screen map controls
qr_button.position: ✓ Button positioned in right-side control stack

qr_navigation.click_navigation: ✓ Clicking QR button navigates to /qr page
qr_navigation.back_button: ✓ Back button (testID='back-qr-btn') returns to main screen

qr_page_scan_mode.mode_toggle: ✓ Mode toggle visible with Scan/Show buttons (testID='mode-scan', 'mode-show')
qr_page_scan_mode.permission_text: ✓ Permission text: 'Potrebna je dozvola za kameru'

qr_page_show_mode.mode_switch: ✓ Clicking 'Prikaži' button switches to show mode
qr_page_show_mode.qr_display: ✓ Show mode displays QR code generation UI
qr_page_show_mode.placeholder_text: ✓ Shows placeholder: 'Odaberite lokaciju iz admin panela za generisanje QR koda'
qr_page_show_mode.title: ✓ Title: 'QR Kod lokacije'

category_grid.column_count: ✓ Category grid has 6 items in 3-column layout
category_grid.layout: ✓ Grid uses flexWrap with 3 columns (width calculation: (width - 52) / 3)
category_grid.styling: ✓ Each item has icon, name, and location count

regression_tests.map: ✓ Map loads correctly at top of screen
regression_tests.offers_section: ✓ Offers section shows 3 offers with discount badges
regression_tests.browse_all: ✓ Browse all button visible and functional
regression_tests.category_list: ✓ Clicking category opens filtered list view
regression_tests.category_search: ✓ Search input works in category list
regression_tests.location_cards: ✓ Location cards show name, address, open/closed badge, rating
regression_tests.navigation: ✓ All navigation (back buttons, page switches) works correctly

nearby_offers_api.response_fields: id, location_id, title, description, discount_percent, is_active, location_name, location_image, distance
nearby_offers_api.distance_calculation: ✓ Uses Haversine formula (calc_distance function in server.py lines 219-223)
nearby_offers_api.enrichment: ✓ Enriches with location_name and location_image from locations collection

qr_data_api.response_fields: location_id, location_name, offers (array of {id, title, discount_percent})

coupon_activation_api.fields_stored: id, offer_id, location_id, user_name, activated_at, redeemed (false), redeemed_at (null)

activations_list_api.response: Array of activations sorted by activated_at descending
activations_list_api.use_case: Business owners see who activated their coupons

redeem_api.action: Sets redeemed: true, redeemed_at: current timestamp
redeem_api.use_case: Business marks coupon as used when customer redeems

backend_endpoints.GET_api_offers_nearby: ✓ Working - Returns nearby offers with distance, sorted by distance
backend_endpoints.GET_api_locations_id_qr_data: ✓ Working - Returns QR data with location info and active offers
backend_endpoints.POST_api_offers_id_activate: ✓ Working - Activates coupon, creates activation record
backend_endpoints.PUT_api_coupon_activations_id_redeem: ✓ Working - Marks coupon as redeemed (requires auth)

frontend_ui.qr_scan_button: ✓ Working - Blue button on main map controls, navigates to /qr
frontend_ui.qr_page_scan_mode: ✓ Working - Shows camera permission prompt, has scan UI
frontend_ui.qr_page_show_mode: ✓ Working - Shows QR code generation placeholder
frontend_ui.mode_toggle: ✓ Working - Switches between scan and show modes
frontend_ui.category_grid_3_columns: ✓ Working - Grid layout with 3 columns, 6 items visible
frontend_ui.all_previous_features: ✓ Working - Map, offers, events, categories, detail pages all functional

data_flow.nearby_offers_distance: ✓ Backend calculates distance using Haversine formula, filters by radius, sorts ascending
data_flow.qr_data_enrichment: ✓ Backend fetches location and active offers, returns structured QR data
data_flow.coupon_activation_flow: ✓ User scans QR → activates coupon → activation stored in DB → business sees activation → business redeems
data_flow.auth_protection: ✓ Activations list and redeem endpoints protected by business/admin auth

nearby_offers_endpoint.logic: ✓ Fetches all active offers, calculates distance for each, filters by radius, sorts by distance
nearby_offers_endpoint.enrichment: ✓ Adds location_name and location_image from locations collection
nearby_offers_endpoint.return_type: ✓ Returns array of offers with distance field

qr_data_endpoint.logic: ✓ Fetches location by ID, fetches active offers for location
qr_data_endpoint.offers_structure: ✓ Each offer has id, title, discount_percent

coupon_activation_endpoint.validation: ✓ Checks offer exists and is active
coupon_activation_endpoint.database: ✓ Inserts activation record with UUID, timestamps
coupon_activation_endpoint.error_handling: ✓ Returns 404 if offer not found or inactive

activations_list_endpoint.query: ✓ Filters by offer_id, sorts by activated_at descending

redeem_endpoint.update: ✓ Sets redeemed: true, redeemed_at: current timestamp

coupon_activation_model.fields: id (UUID), offer_id, location_id, user_name, activated_at (datetime), redeemed (bool), redeemed_at (optional datetime)
coupon_activation_model.defaults: ✓ id auto-generated, activated_at auto-set, redeemed defaults to false
